initial_outreach.subject: We called {{company_name}} today
initial_outreach.body_html:
Hi {{ceo_first_name}},

My grandfather ran a small business for 40 years. The thing that kept him up at night wasn't competitors or the economy -- it was waiting to get paid.

We called {{company_name}}'s billing department today. Here's what we found:

    {{findings_bullets}}

How far off am I?

We built an AI that handles AR calls 24/7 -- no hold times, no voicemail, no missed revenue. Companies using it recover 3x faster.

Worth 15 minutes to see your audit?

{{audit_page_link}}

Best,
Jonathan Banner
CEO, AgentCollect (YC S23)
jb@agentcollect.com
